subject: Fw: Sultan
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Subject: Re: Sultan
 

of course

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, March 11, 2007 1:20:28 PM
Subject: FW: Sultan


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Sunday, March 11, 2007 12:43 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Sultan

He is coming to the grande opening with a turkish partner named fattah.
He wanted to know if your offer to have them stay with you was still
open?
